This test checks that hover doc links to private packages are rendered as plain
text while public doc links remain linked.

-- env --
GOPRIVATE=mod.com

-- go.mod --
module mod.com

go 1.20

-- p.go --
package p

import (
	"encoding/json"

	"mod.com/lib"
)

type U struct{}

var _ = json.Marshal
var _ = lib.L{}

// T should not link private targets, but should preserve public doc links.
//
// T also references [U], [lib.L], and [json.Marshal].
type T struct{} //@hover("T", "T", T)

-- lib/lib.go --
package lib

type L struct{}

-- @T --
```go
type T struct{} // size=0
```

---

T should not link private targets, but should preserve public doc links.

T also references U, lib.L, and [json.Marshal](https://pkg.go.dev/encoding/json#Marshal).
